requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety, Enclosure Protection, Hurricane Exposure, and Salt-Mist Derating
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全、防护等级、飓风暴露和盐雾降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全、防護等級、颶風暴露和鹽霧降額

summary.en: Antigua and Barbuda's standards environment is administered by the Antigua and Barbuda Bureau of Standards (ABBS), with UK/IEC legacy practice common for electrical equipment. EV chargers should be documented to IEC 61851-1 for conductive charging safety and IEC 61851-23 for DC stations, with IEC 62196 connector evidence where applicable. Outdoor chargers also need enclosure, corrosion, surge, and mechanical mounting evidence suitable for a hurricane-prone, marine salt-mist island environment with high humidity, heat, wind-driven rain, and sea-freight handling through St John's.
summary.zh: 安提瓜和巴布达标准环境由安提瓜和巴布达标准局（ABBS）管理，电气设备常沿用英制/IEC实践。电动汽车充电桩应按IEC 61851-1准备传导充电安全文件，直流站还应按IEC 61851-23准备文件，并在适用时提供IEC 62196接口证据。户外充电桩还需要提供适用于飓风多发、海洋盐雾岛国环境的外壳、防腐、浪涌和机械安装证据，并考虑高湿、高温、风雨及经圣约翰港海运装卸。
summary.zht: 安地卡及巴布達標準環境由安地卡及巴布達標準局（ABBS）管理，電氣設備常沿用英制/IEC實務。電動汽車充電樁應按IEC 61851-1準備傳導充電安全文件，直流站還應按IEC 61851-23準備文件，並在適用時提供IEC 62196接口證據。戶外充電樁還需要提供適用於颶風多發、海洋鹽霧島國環境的外殼、防腐、浪湧和機械安裝證據，並考慮高濕、高溫、風雨及經聖約翰港海運裝卸。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
IEC 60068-2-52 or equivalent salt-mist / cyclic corrosion evidence where required by project
ABBS-adopted standards and local electrical installation requirements

summary.en: China's comparable domestic baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, supported by GB/T 20234 connector standards and GB/T 27930 communication for DC charging. GB/T evidence can support engineering review, but it does not replace IEC 61851 clause-level evidence, IEC 62196 connector test evidence, or project-specific environmental qualification for Caribbean outdoor deployment.
summary.zh: 中国可比国内基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，并由GB/T 20234接口标准及直流充电GB/T 27930通信配套。GB/T证据可支持工程审查，但不能替代IEC 61851逐条证据、IEC 62196接口测试证据或针对加勒比户外部署的项目特定环境资质。
summary.zht: 中國可比國內基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，並由GB/T 20234接口標準及直流充電GB/T 27930通訊配套。GB/T證據可支持工程審查，但不能替代IEC 61851逐條證據、IEC 62196接口測試證據或針對加勒比戶外部署的項目特定環境資質。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products, IEC 62196 connector reports, IP and IK enclosure certificates, corrosion-resistant material declarations, surge-protection ratings, anchoring and wind-load assumptions, thermal derating data, and installation instructions for marine outdoor service. A China GB/T safety report without IEC mapping and island-environment review is not a complete Antigua and Barbuda safety package.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、直流产品IEC 61851-23证据、IEC 62196接口报告、IP和IK外壳证书、防腐材料声明、浪涌保护额定值、锚固和风载假设、热降额数据，以及适用于海洋户外服务的安装说明。未进行IEC映射和岛国环境审查的中国GB/T安全报告，并不是完整的安提瓜和巴布达安全资料包。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、直流產品IEC 61851-23證據、IEC 62196接口報告、IP和IK外殼證書、防腐材料聲明、浪湧保護額定值、錨固和風載假設、熱降額數據，以及適用於海洋戶外服務的安裝說明。未進行IEC映射和島國環境審查的中國GB/T安全報告，並不是完整的安地卡及巴布達安全資料包。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by ABBS-adopted standards, project specification, importer, site owner, insurer, or APUA/electrical-installation acceptance; environmental derating is a practical requirement for outdoor island deployment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence without additional mapping or testing

source.publisher: Antigua and Barbuda Bureau of Standards (ABBS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design reference only. Antigua and Barbuda-facing EVSE documentation should include IEC 61851 evidence, IEC connector evidence, and environmental proof for salt mist, hurricane exposure, surge, and outdoor thermal performance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计参考。面向安提瓜和巴布达的EVSE文件应包括IEC 61851证据、IEC接口证据，以及针对盐雾、飓风暴露、浪涌和户外热性能的环境证明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計參考。面向安地卡及巴布達的EVSE文件應包括IEC 61851證據、IEC接口證據，以及針對鹽霧、颶風暴露、浪湧和戶外熱性能的環境證明。
